title: selaginella microtus
intro: Selaginella microtus, also known as the Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant in the genus Selaginella, characterized by its small, spiky leaves and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella microtus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Selaginella microtus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
